title: Glowstone
description: The Vanilla+ pack for heavily modded enthusiasts
body:
The Vanilla+ pack for those of us spoiled by heavily modded packs. I know you can't live without your backpacks, digital storage, and veinminer.

Comes with a range of tasteful building mods that provide satisfactory options while not overwhelming you, as well as [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage), retextured by [Repainted Storage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/repainted-storage) to fit in with modern textures.

Comes with [Resource Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-backpacks), configured to improve balance, and [Metal Bundles](https://modrinth.com/mod/metal-bundles), to increase the default bundle size to two stacks, as well as providing an upgraded version.

Other large mods:
- [Charm](https://charmony.work) (configured)
- [CliffTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/59ypHk8x) (worldgen)
- [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/WBvnqHfV) (worldgen)
- [Trimmable Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/MJu3fF3K)
- [Veinminer](https://modrinth.com/mod/4sP0LXxp)
- [Xaero's](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym)
- [Mortar](https://modrinth.com/mod/26zEKxNr) (building blocks)
- [Arts & Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/JI9mEkvq) (building blocks)
- [Enchanting Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/vnVwuAph) (easier no-rng enchanting)
- [Bamboo Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/DwwbOcmt) (earlygame trident alternative, configured)

Comes with other essentials like mouse tweaks, optimisation mods, jade, mod menu, etc, as well, of course.
